intro.label: Why Havenkvist Tech
intro.title: Technical craft meets business understanding
intro.body: I combine modern web technology with a clear understanding of what actually drives your business forward. No unnecessary complexity — just solutions that work, load fast, and are easy to maintain.

points.body: No heavy page builders. Every component is written from scratch with React and Next.js, keeping your site fast and flexible.

meta.title: About – Freelance Web Developer in Haslev
meta.description: Meet Lucas, fullstack developer and the person behind Havenkvist Tech. Based in Haslev, Denmark, building modern, fast websites for businesses across Zealand.

hero.label: About
hero.title: Code by day, code by night
hero.subtitle: The developer behind Havenkvist Tech — and why this studio exists.

story.label: My background
story.title: A fullstack developer with a nighttime obsession for the frontend
paragraphs: I'm Lucas, a fullstack developer based in Haslev, Denmark. By day, I build and maintain production applications with Elixir and Phoenix LiveView — systems that need to stay fast, reliable, and easy to reason about at scale.

Havenkvist Tech is my evening and weekend project — a small freelance studio where I explore the other side of the stack. Here, I mainly work with React, TypeScript, and Next.js, building modern websites and web applications for clients who want a fast, polished online presence.

Splitting my time between two ecosystems keeps me sharp. The discipline and simplicity I value in Elixir shapes how I write React — predictable state, clear data flow, and code that won't surprise you six months from now.
When I'm not at my day job or working on client projects, you'll usually find me refining this very site, reading up on web performance, or experimenting with the newest Next.js features.

points.title: Reliability
points.body: Production experience from my day job means I take uptime, testing, and maintainability seriously — even for small projects.

points.title: Clear communication
points.body: You'll always know where your project stands. No jargon, no radio silence — just honest, direct updates.

points.title: Modern craft
points.body: Every project is built with the same modern stack I use to explore new ideas: React, TypeScript, and Next.js.

contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.body: Have a project in mind, or just want to say hi? Reach out directly — I read and answer every message myself.

cta.title: Ready to start a project?
cta.body: Let's talk about what you're building and how I can help bring it to life.

list.title: Web Development (Next.js/React)

list.title: Maintenance & Support
list.description: Ongoing technical maintenance so your website stays up to date, secure, and bug-free — without you having to think about it.

addon.label: Optional add-on
addon.body: I'll make sure your site keeps running perfectly. This includes hosting management and domain renewal, so you never have to worry about the technical details.
addon.note: If you choose to handle it yourself, I will help you set up the domain and hosting initially. After launch, renewals, uptime, and ongoing technical updates will be your responsibility.

list.title: Performance Optimization
list.description: Faster websites mean better user experience, higher conversion, and better search engine rankings.
features: Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse analysis

steps.title: Kickoff
steps.body: We uncover your goals, target audience, and requirements in an initial conversation.

steps.title: Design & development
steps.body: I build the solution in iterations, so you can follow along and give feedback throughout.

steps.title: Testing & launch
steps.body: Thorough testing of performance, security, and functionality before launch.

steps.title: Follow-up
steps.body: After launch, I'm ready with support and further development as needed.

meta.title: Services & Pricing – Websites for Tradespeople & Local Businesses
meta.description: Web development, maintenance, and performance optimization for small businesses, with transparent pricing starting at 9.995 kr. and hourly freelance rates. Based in Haslev, Denmark.

hero.label: Services & Pricing
hero.title: What I build, and what it costs
hero.subtitle: From new websites to ongoing maintenance and hourly freelance work — see what's included and what it costs, with no hidden fees.

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.description: Perfect for entrepreneurs and small businesses that need a professional online presence.
tiers.details: A clean, high-performance website with up to 5 pages — ideal for a homepage, services overview, about section, and contact details. It is fully responsive across phones and tablets, optimized for Google searches, and includes a secure contact form. Includes 1 month of dedicated support after launch to ensure everything runs smoothly.

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.description: For businesses that need custom functionality and better performance.
tiers.details: A comprehensive, fully custom-designed website with up to 12 pages, built from scratch tailored entirely to your brand. Includes user-friendly CMS integration, allowing you to update text and photos easily without touching a single line of code. Features advanced speed optimization and thorough SEO. Supports a multilingual setup (Danish/English) to target local and international customers. Includes 3 months of dedicated support after launch.

tiers.name: Hourly / Ad-hoc
tiers.description: For existing websites that need ongoing updates, debugging, or custom features.
tiers.details: Perfect if you already have a working website but need an experienced developer to fix bugs, build a new subpage, optimize performance, or add custom React/Next.js components. You only pay for the exact time spent, and I track all hours transparently. This option is highly flexible and ideal for smaller, ongoing adjustments or consulting without committing to a full package.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: For complex projects, web applications, and businesses with specific requirements.
tiers.details: Tailored for businesses needing advanced systems — such as custom booking engines, client portals, or deep integrations with your current business tools (accounting, CRM, or inventory software). There are no page limits, and every backend connection is built securely. Features premium speed setups and a dedicated ongoing maintenance agreement with priority support to ensure lightning-fast resolutions.

pricing.note: All prices exclude VAT (moms). Hosting and domain are not included in the one-time project packages — I will gladly help you get everything set up initially, or you can opt for the Maintenance & Support plan to have me manage it continuously.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: A typical Basic project takes 2-3 weeks, while Professional and Enterprise projects usually take 4-8 weeks depending on the overall scope and specific functionality needed.

items.question: Can I edit the content myself afterward?
items.answer: Yes. For Professional and Enterprise packages, I integrate a Content Management System (CMS) so you can update copy, manage pages, and change images independently without writing code.

items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
items.answer: Yes, projects are securely invoiced in two equal installments: 50% upfront at project kickoff and the remaining 50% upon final launch. Get in touch to arrange the practical details.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Tell me about your project and I'll get back to you within 24 hours with next steps.
